assertions.title: Line up/down scrolls content and pauses playback

steps.action: Locate the targeted tests and implementation for line navigation.
steps.expected: There is focused coverage for line up/down scroll delta, playback pause, arrow-key edit-mode gating, and editable-target guards.
steps.observed: TeleprompterView.test.tsx contains a dedicated VAL-TELE-012 block and TeleprompterView.tsx implements jumpLines plus keyboard guards.

steps.action: Run the focused Vitest subset for VAL-TELE-012.
steps.observed: Vitest exited 0 with 7 passed tests and 81 skipped in src/teleprompter/TeleprompterView.test.tsx.

steps.action: Review the test expectations against the implementation.
steps.expected: Line down/up changes scrollTop by fontSize × lineHeight × 1.5, pauses playback, and arrow keys only work in edit mode while ignoring editable targets.
steps.observed: The test block and implementation both match the contract behavior.

assertions.title: Exit button unregisters hotkeys, exits mode, resets state

steps.action: Locate the targeted tests and implementation for exit flow.
steps.expected: There is focused coverage for IPC call ordering, state reset, and unregister failure resilience.
steps.observed: TeleprompterView.test.tsx contains a dedicated VAL-TELE-013 block and TeleprompterView.tsx implements onExit with unregister, exit, and state reset.

steps.action: Run the focused Vitest subset for VAL-TELE-013.
steps.observed: Vitest exited 0 with 3 passed tests and 85 skipped in src/teleprompter/TeleprompterView.test.tsx.

steps.action: Review the test expectations against the implementation.
steps.expected: Exit should call unregister_hotkeys before exit_teleprompter_mode and end with playing=false, editMode=false, mode='editor'.
steps.observed: The tests verify order and final state, and the implementation matches that behavior.

assertions.title: Drag handle calls startDragging in edit mode only

steps.action: Locate the targeted tests and implementation for the drag handle.
steps.expected: There is focused coverage for pointerdown behavior, accessibility attributes, and edit-mode-only rendering.
steps.observed: TeleprompterView.test.tsx contains a dedicated VAL-TELE-014 block and TeleprompterView.tsx renders the drag handle with the required attributes and pointer handler.

steps.action: Run the focused Vitest subset for VAL-TELE-014.
steps.observed: Vitest exited 0 with 4 passed tests and 84 skipped in src/teleprompter/TeleprompterView.test.tsx.

steps.action: Review the test expectations against the implementation.
steps.expected: Pointerdown should call startDragging only in edit mode, with aria-label='Drag to move', role='button', and tabIndex=-1.
steps.observed: The tests and source both match the contract behavior.

assertions.title: All 8 resize handles present in edit mode with correct directions

steps.action: Locate the targeted tests and implementation for resize handles.
steps.expected: There is focused coverage for all eight handles, direction mapping, the southeast grip label, and absence outside edit mode.
steps.observed: TeleprompterView.test.tsx contains a dedicated VAL-TELE-015 block and TeleprompterView.tsx renders the edge/corner handles with the expected direction handlers.

steps.action: Run the focused Vitest subset for VAL-TELE-015.
steps.observed: Vitest exited 0 with 4 passed tests and 84 skipped in src/teleprompter/TeleprompterView.test.tsx.

steps.action: Review the test expectations against the implementation.
steps.expected: The four edge and four corner handles should exist only in edit mode, call startResizeDragging with correct directions, and expose aria-label='Resize' on the southeast grip.
steps.observed: The tests and source both match the contract behavior.

frictions.description: Focused TeleprompterView Vitest runs emit repeated React act(...) warnings on stderr while still exiting successfully.
frictions.resolution: Treated as non-blocking test-noise because each targeted command exited 0 and the assertion-specific expectations passed.

frictions.description: The VAL-TELE-013 resilience test intentionally logs `unregister hotkeys failed (continuing exit)` to stderr when the mock rejects.
frictions.resolution: Confirmed it is expected test evidence for the rejection-handling path; the focused run still passed.

summary: Validated 4 overlay navigation/exit assertions with focused Vitest subsets and static source reads. VAL-TELE-012, VAL-TELE-013, VAL-TELE-014, and VAL-TELE-015 all passed.
